CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-06-2009 CONTINUED TO DEC-11-2009 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $677.50, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. LATE OPPOSITION HAS BEEN CONSIDERED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 612, NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTCH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT -HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF AMERICA CALIFORNIA BANK'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET ITS BURDEN OF PROOF IN THE APPLICATION AS THE EXHIBIT TO THE REPLY WAS NOT A PART OF THE APPLICATION. ADDITIONALLY, THE EXHIBIT TO THE REPLY IS NOT AUTHENTICATED BY DECLARATION AND IS NEW EVIDENCE. THE SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF THE APPLICATION IS NOT TIMELY. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Response To Discovery
Off Calendar Dec-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Response To Discovery is granted. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $677.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Late opposition has been considered. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attch Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David J. Cook, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: America California Bank
Richard J. Mooney, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: James S. Goody

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff America California Bank's Application For Writ Of Attachment is denied. Plaintiff did not meet its burden of proof in the application as the exhibit to the reply was not a part of the application. Additionally, the exhibit to the reply is not authenticated by declaration and is new evidence. The supplemental declaration in support of the application is not timely. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
